synopsis: Cade Skywalker's vow, "No one dies for me," is put to the ultimate test. Cade, who has long been on the run from his family legacy, has reached a crossroads with heavy personal consequences no matter which way he chooses. Meanwhile, an opportunity for peace has turned into a three-way battle between Jedi, Sith, and the Imperial Knights! It's a turning point for Cade Skywalker and the entire Legacy story line!
title: Legacy #46: Monster, Part 4
